results.rendered_html:
śithira adj. (f. ā) locker, lose, schlaff; zart, weich (Gegens. dṛḍha): sarvā tā vi ṣyā śithireva  ṚV. 5,85,8 . Arme des Savitar 7,45,2 . ni jāhuṣaṃ śithire dhātamantaḥ inʼs Weiche niedersetzen 71,5 .  AV. 10,2,3 . aṣṭrā schwank  ṚV. 6,58,2 . parvāṇi śithirāṇi santi dṛ|āni locker (d. h. beweglich) und [Page7-0186] doch fest  AIT. BR. 3,31 . 6,16 .  TS. 3,2,4,3 .  PAÑCAV. BR. 1,1,7 .
— Vgl. śithila, ślatha und śrath.
